reference: Before asking a question, you must put forward the facts. one. Is Janumet being taken once or twice a day? two. Is the blood sugar level of one hundred and ninety-three measured while fasting or after meals? If it is after meals, the timing is important.
text: Before asking a question, you must put forward the facts. One: is Janumet being taken once or twice a day? Two: is the blood sugar level of 193 measured while fasting or after milk? If it is after milk, the timing is important.
